rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WALTER JOHN KORDAS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to May 15, 2013 to allow for publication. An amendment to a petition requires the same notice of hearing, including publication, as the petition it amends. The proof of service attached to the amendment is not sufficient.
